title: carpinus mollicoma
intro: Carpinus mollicoma, also known as the Chinese hornbeam, is a deciduous tree species native to China, characterized by its distinctive branching and small, elliptical leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carpinus mollicoma include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree can be decocted or infused to create teas, tinctures, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
